recommendations.title: Complexes
recommendations.overview: In the first episode, Quirino tries to conquer co-worker Gabriella. In the second episode, Prof. Beozi ends up in a raid of the police in a local for homosexuals when trying to avoid a scandal. In the third episode, Guglielmo passes all tests in orde
recommendations.director: Dino Risi, Luigi Filippo D'Amico, Franco Rossi

recommendations.title: The Man Without Gravity
recommendations.overview: A gravity-defying boy raised in seclusion matures into an extraordinary man -- and an international celebrity -- who longs for human connection.

recommendations.title: Afterwards
recommendations.overview: Newly divorced lawyer Nathan Del Amico is shaken up after he meets a doctor who claims that he can sense when select people are about to die. Though he doesn't believe the doctor, events in Nathan's life slowly make him think he's not long for this w

recommendations.title: Don Camillo's Last Round
recommendations.overview: Bewildered, Don Camillo learns that Peppone intends to stand for parliament. Determined to thwart his ambitions, the good priest, ignoring the recommendations of the Lord, decides to campaign against him.

recommendations.title: Extreme Movie
recommendations.overview: A sketch comedy movie about the joys and embarrassments of teen sex. But mostly the embarrassments.

recommendations.title: Tim and Eric's Billion Dollar Movie
recommendations.overview: Two guys get a billion dollars to make a movie, only to watch their dream run off course.

recommendations.title: Barbarella
recommendations.overview: In the far future, a highly sexual woman is tasked with finding and stopping the evil Durand-Durand. Along the way she encounters various unusual people.

recommendations.title: Prey
recommendations.overview: When danger threatens her camp, the fierce and highly skilled Comanche warrior Naru sets out to protect her people. But the prey she stalks turns out to be a highly evolved alien predator with a technically advanced arsenal.

recommendations.title: Not for the Young
recommendations.overview: Frustrated with their lack of upward mobility, some young Italians move to Cuba to start a wi-fi café and attempt to build a new life.

recommendations.title: Two Sons of Francisco
recommendations.overview: The story of Francisco, a very simple and poor man whose dream was to see his children become country music stars, and who made all the efforts to make it happen.
